strengths: ~15 years of software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in current role at re:cinq
Background in TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership (CTO/VP) or scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LangGraph, or agentic framework experience at scale
Lacks fintech-infrastructure depth (credit systems, real-time credit risk, regulatory compliance across jurisdictions)

key_factors.factor: Missing production multi-agent AI systems experience

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff individual contributor but shows no evidence of operating at the executive level required for a CTO role. The resume lacks any track record of scaling engineering organizations to 30+, building senior leadership layers, or governing hybrid outsourced delivery models. Critically, there is no production multi-agent AI work, no LangGraph or comparable agentic framework experience, and no fintech-infrastructure exposure (credit risk, working-capital systems, multi-jurisdiction compliance). Recent AI-agent involvement at re:cinq appears to be tooling-level contribution rather than architectural ownership. Overall, this is a weak fit for an executive role demanding deep agentic-AI architecture and regulated fintech leadership.
